title: Pragmata Game Sells Over 1 Million Units Worldwide in 1st 2 Days
content: The science-fiction action-adventure game launched for Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam on April 17, one week earlier than the planned April 24 date. The game has a demo available now for all four platforms. CAPCOM delayed the game's release in June 2025.
author: ANN

title: Beast of Reincarnation Game Streams Pre-Order Trailer
content: GAME FREAK ( Pokémon ) streamed a new trailer for its Beast of Reincarnation game on Monday, announcing that the game is available for pre-order. The video reveals pre-order bonuses, including the Brown Shiba skin for regular pre-orders and a Black Shiba skin, Oni's Hat, and Big Dipper Sword for pre-orders of the…
author: ANN

title: The Klutzy Class Monitor and the Girl with the Short Skirt, Liar Game Anime Reveal English Dub Cast, Apri 20 Premiere
content: Crunchyroll begins streaming the English dubs for the television anime of Takuma Yokota 's Ponkotsu Fūkiin to Skirt Take ga Futekisetsu na JK no Hanashi (Story of the Useless Public Morals Committeeman and the High School Girl With Inappropriate Skirt Length) manga and the television anime of Shinobu Kaitani 's Liar…
author: ANN

title: Kirio Fan Club Anime Reveals 2 New Cast Members
content: The anime premiered on April 2 at 24:26 (effectively, April 3 at 12:26 a.m.) JST in the Super Animeism TURBO programming block on MBS , TBS , and 26 affiliated channels. It also runs on the AT-X channel. HIDIVE is streaming the anime as it airs.
author: ANN

title: Live-Action Elden Ring Film Reveals Cast, March 2028 Premiere
content: The companies revealed the full cast, which includes: • Kit Connor (Warfare, Heartstopper) • Ben Whishaw (Skyfall, Paddington) • Cailee Spaeny (Alien: Romulus, Civil War) • Tom Burke (Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga, Black Bag) • Havana Rose Liu (Bottoms) • Sonoya Mizuno (Ex Machina) • Jonathan Pryce (The Two Popes) • Ruby…
author: ANN

title: Takaaki Hayashi Launches New Baki Gaiden Manga in May
content: The June issue of Akita Publishing 's Champion RED magazine announced on Friday Takaaki Hayashi will launch a new Baki Gaiden spinoff manga titled Baki Gaiden Doppo: Hitori Nomi Kui Aruki ( Baki Side Story Doppo: Drinking, Eating, Walking Alone) in the next issue on May 19. Kenji Hamaoka will draw the storyboards.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen’s Sequel Reveals Stunning First Look At Its Final Release
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Jujutsu Kaisen manga! The sequel manga Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo , written by Gege Akutami and illustrated by Yuji Iwasaki, reached its conclusion in March 2026 after six months of serialization.
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus Reveals "SUPER GEKITOU" Trailer, New Comments from Cast and Staff
content: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus anime revealed its “SUPER GEKITOU” trailer during the DRAGON BALL SUPER Special Panel at Dragon Ball Games Battle Hour 2026 in Los Angeles. The series is scheduled to premiere in Fall 2026, slowly leading up to the upcoming Dragon Ball Super: The Galactic Patrol (Moro Arc) anime.
author: Anime Corner

title: Cannes' Annecy Animation Showcase to Feature dwarf studios' Hidari Stop-Motion Samurai Film, Takayuki Hirao's Wasted Chef Anime Film
content: Japanese stop-motion animation studio dwarf studios announced on Monday that the pilot film for its HIDARI stop-motion samurai film will screen at the Annecy Animation Showcase of the 79th Cannes International Film Festival.
author: ANN

title: The 7 Biggest Changes Netflix’s Live-Action One Piece Series Has Made (So Far)
content: One Piece Live Action is an adaptation that will go down in history as one of the first examples of how love and care can make even the most controversial anime adaptations work. Not only was the first season a success, but the second season was even better, bolder, and bigger, improving on what came before.
author: ComicBook
